nodes.grounding_span: the need for constant fact-checking and double-checking prevents me from using them in certain ways

nodes.label: AI as job role transformer

nodes.grounding_span: I am a flexible worker and believe that my role will change rather than be eradicated

nodes.label: Iterative prompt refinement

nodes.label: Domain-based boundary setting — clear separation of AI-appropriate vs. human-only tasks
